description_long: This is a large, rectangular double-sided desk with a natural wood grain finish and a central divider panel running lengthwise down the middle. The desk features a flat, expansive surface suitable for multiple users, supported by sturdy black metal legs at each corner and midway along the length for added stability. The central divider is made of a light-colored opaque material, providing privacy and separation between users on either side. The wood surface has a smooth, matte finish with visible swirling grain patterns, giving it a modern yet natural aesthetic. There are no visible drawers, shelves, or cable management features attached to the desk. The overall design is minimalist and functional, ideal for collaborative or shared workspaces.
description: A large, double-sided wooden desk with a central privacy divider and black metal legs, featuring a smooth, natural wood grain surface. Its minimalist design is ideal for shared or collaborative workspaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the desk, the central divider, and the wood grain surface with three sets of black metal legs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the desk, the split wood surface, and the divider running down the center.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, displaying the length, divider, and leg arrangement from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the desk's depth and the central divider from the other end.
attribute_orientation: The desk is oriented with the long side facing the user, and the central divider panel runs lengthwise to separate two workspaces on either side. The front is defined by the unobstructed edge of the desk surface.
attribute_usage_context: shared workstation for collaborative or individual computer work
